goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should 'arrive by 16:45'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should arrive by 16:45
The train should leave on sunday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee
